header.title: Bram Textiles and Loomware sign supply deal

gold.name: Bram Textiles
claims: Bram Textiles is a family-owned mill in Ghent.
Bram Textiles signed a five-year supply agreement with Loomware on 3 February 2026.
Bram Textiles will remain the exclusive European testing site for Loomware's next machine generation.

gold.name: Loomware
claims: Loomware makes control systems for industrial looms.
Loomware signed a five-year supply agreement with Bram Textiles on 3 February 2026.
Loomware will install its automated warping machines at Bram Textiles' main plant.
Loomware will train Bram Textiles' operators during 2026.
